11/1/03	Rome, Italy, Palalottomatica (Palaeur)	

	
Great recording.Unknown origin


CD1

1 intro 2 To Be Alone With You, 3 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic), 4 Cry A While, 5 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic), 6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), 7 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic), 8 Man In The Long Black Coat, 9 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, 10 Love Minus Zero/No Limit (acoustic), 11 Highway 61 Revisited,
